metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated conditioning programs and become knowledgeable about dancer wellness and career longevity. This course emphasizes advanced strength development, specialized conditioning, and evidence-based practices.
metadata.general_description: Advanced conditioning course for dancer wellness, strength development, and career longevity.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced conditioning is foundational to professional dance careers and long-term wellness.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 dancers understand conditioning as essential to career sustainability, injury prevention, and maintaining performance capacity over time.

big_ideas.statement: Evidence-based conditioning practices combine scientific understanding with practical application.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced dancers engage with research-based approaches to conditioning, understanding current best practices and emerging scientific findings.

big_ideas.statement: Specialized conditioning addresses individual needs, diverse dance styles, and specific performance demands.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop sophisticated understanding of how to tailor conditioning for specific goals, injuries, and performance contexts.

big_ideas.statement: Dancer wellness encompasses physical conditioning, nutrition, mental health, and holistic wellbeing.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced dancers integrate multiple wellness dimensions into comprehensive personal health and professional development plans.

i_can_statements: I can design sophisticated conditioning programs addressing specific goals
I can develop periodized training plans with progressive complexity
I can create specialized programs for different dance styles
I can adjust programs based on individual needs and responses

competencies.raw: Implement advanced strength and power development
i_can_statements: I can execute advanced strengthening exercises with high technical proficiency
I can develop power and explosiveness for complex movement demands
I can balance strength development across muscle groups
I can integrate strength training with technical dance practice

competencies.raw: Manage conditioning, health, and wellness holistically
i_can_statements: I can integrate nutrition, sleep, and stress management with conditioning
I can develop sustainable wellness practices
I can monitor and respond to fatigue and recovery needs
I can create comprehensive wellness plans
I can understand rehabilitation following injury
I can work effectively with medical and therapeutic professionals
I can implement evidence-based injury prevention strategies
I can adapt conditioning for physical limitations or concerns

competencies.raw: Understand advanced anatomy and exercise physiology
i_can_statements: I can explain complex anatomical and physiological concepts
I can understand how different training methods affect body systems
I can apply exercise science principles to conditioning design
I can stay current with research and scientific understanding

competencies.raw: Evaluate conditioning methods critically using evidence-based approaches
i_can_statements: I can critically evaluate conditioning claims and methods
I can distinguish between evidence-based and unproven practices
I can understand limitations and individual variation in conditioning
I can make informed decisions based on scientific evidence

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal conditioning and wellness trajectory
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my conditioning progress and overall wellness
I can identify long-term conditioning and health goals
I can reflect on my conditioning practices and effectiveness
I can envision lifelong wellness and conditioning practices

competencies.raw: Understand professional conditioning standards and practices
i_can_statements: I can understand conditioning practices in professional dance
I can recognize best practices and standards in the field
I can appreciate diversity of conditioning approaches
I can evaluate professional conditioning programs

competencies.raw: Create detailed conditioning documentation and plans
i_can_statements: I can develop comprehensive, detailed conditioning plans
I can maintain detailed records of conditioning progress
I can create professional-quality documentation and reports
I can organize complex conditioning information clearly

competencies.raw: Communicate effectively with health and conditioning professionals
i_can_statements: I can discuss conditioning and health concerns knowledgeably
I can ask informed questions of medical and therapy professionals
I can advocate for my conditioning and health needs
I can communicate professionally with healthcare providers

competencies.raw: Share conditioning knowledge and support peer wellness
i_can_statements: I can teach conditioning exercises with proper instruction
I can mentor peers in conditioning practices
I can advocate for dancer health and wellness
I can share evidence-based conditioning information responsibly

competencies.raw: Articulate personal conditioning philosophy and practice
i_can_statements: I can explain my personal conditioning approach and reasoning
I can discuss my wellness philosophy and values
I can reflect on the importance of conditioning to my career
I can advocate for comprehensive dancer wellness

competencies.raw: Connect conditioning to diverse professional dance contexts
i_can_statements: I can understand conditioning needs for different dance careers
I can adapt conditioning for various professional contexts
I can develop conditioning for long-term career sustainability
I can address specialized conditioning for specific roles or styles

competencies.raw: Engage with emerging conditioning research and practices
i_can_statements: I can stay informed about current conditioning research
I can evaluate new conditioning methods and technologies
I can integrate innovative approaches thoughtfully
I can participate in advancement of conditioning practices

competencies.raw: Understand conditioning as part of holistic wellness
i_can_statements: I can integrate conditioning with mental health and wellbeing
I can understand connections between physical and mental wellness
I can develop resilience and sustainable wellness practices
I can advocate for comprehensive dancer wellness

competencies.raw: Prepare for career-long conditioning and wellness practice
i_can_statements: I can develop lifelong conditioning and wellness habits
I can plan for conditioning needs across a dance career
I can understand transitions in conditioning as career evolves
I can commit to sustained wellness and longevity

areas.name: Advanced Exercise Physiology and Science
topics: Advanced anatomy relevant to dance-specific conditioning
Energy systems and metabolism in dance

areas.name: Advanced Strength and Power Development
topics: Specialized strength for different dance demands

areas.name: Specialized Conditioning and Rehabilitation
topics: Conditioning for specific conditions or limitations
Working with physical therapists and medical professionals

areas.name: Professional Wellness and Career Longevity
topics: Holistic wellness including nutrition and mental health
Transitions and adaptations in conditioning across career
Preparing for life after performance career
